mbuna_deep_benthic_negative.formula: frequency-weighted ABBA/BABA with the named outgroup; delete-one 1-Mb blocks

mbuna_pelagic_positive.formula: frequency-weighted ABBA/BABA with the named outgroup; delete-one 1-Mb blocks

mbuna_deep_benthic_negative.formula: frequency-weighted ABBA/BABA with the named outgroup; delete-one 1-Mb blocks

mbuna_pelagic_positive.formula: frequency-weighted ABBA/BABA with the named outgroup; delete-one 1-Mb blocks

direction_head.model: StandardScaler plus multinomial logistic regression (lbfgs, C=1)
direction_head.representation: mean and population SD over g=2..16 for each of 27 non-depth coordinates; identical to the external-panel depth grid
direction_head.score_interpretation: uncalibrated out-of-distribution score; not a probability or posterior
direction_head.training_selection: all positive canonical replicates at every migration rate

gate_head.model: StandardScaler plus binary logistic regression (lbfgs, C=1)
gate_head.representation: selected depth rows plus across-depth mean of 27 non-depth coordinates
gate_head.score_interpretation: depth-matched uncalibrated OOD score; not the canonical 243-D gate probability
gate_head.training_target: positive migration with rate >=2.5e-4 versus weak positives plus control

guardrail: Scrub jay is an exact sampled-trio near-zero specificity benchmark. Lake Malawi has a positive sharing benchmark but no directional truth. All scores are uncalibrated OOD diagnostics.

external_expectation.expected_gate: no appreciable event for this exact sampled trio
external_expectation.guardrail: exact near-zero D specificity benchmark, not proof of species-wide isolation; a narrow phenotypic contact zone is known near Mexico City
external_expectation.locus_filter_variant: both alleles observed across the complete trio

filter_contract.cap_method: fixed-seed reservoir over eligible loci, restored to source order
filter_contract.filter: PASS or dot (sources are author-filtered releases)
filter_contract.polymorphism: both REF and ALT must be called across every declared three-population panel
filter_contract.variant: single-base REF and single-base ALT; no multiallelic ALT

simulation_feature_shift.reference: StandardScaler fitted to 2,700 positive regen_full summaries on the identical g=2..16 grid

simulation_gate.interpretation: depth-matched uncalibrated OOD score; not a probability or posterior

simulation_head.interpretation: uncalibrated OOD scores; not probabilities or posteriors

external_expectation.expected_gate: no appreciable event for this exact sampled trio
external_expectation.guardrail: exact near-zero D specificity benchmark, not proof of species-wide isolation; a narrow phenotypic contact zone is known near Mexico City
external_expectation.locus_filter_variant: both alleles observed within each population

filter_contract.cap_method: fixed-seed reservoir over eligible loci, restored to source order
filter_contract.filter: PASS or dot (sources are author-filtered releases)
filter_contract.polymorphism: both REF and ALT must be called within every population of every declared panel
filter_contract.variant: single-base REF and single-base ALT; no multiallelic ALT

simulation_feature_shift.reference: StandardScaler fitted to 2,700 positive regen_full summaries on the identical g=2..16 grid

simulation_gate.interpretation: depth-matched uncalibrated OOD score; not a probability or posterior

simulation_head.interpretation: uncalibrated OOD scores; not probabilities or posteriors

classical_comparator.formula: frequency-weighted ABBA/BABA with the named outgroup; delete-one 1-Mb blocks

external_expectation.direction_guardrail: published f-branch/excess-sharing evidence does not orient donor and recipient; the A/B/C score is descriptive and must not count as directional accuracy
external_expectation.expected_gate: positive excess sharing between mbuna (P2) and pelagic taxa (P3)
external_expectation.locus_filter_variant: both matched three-population panels polymorphic on one shared callable-site intersection
external_expectation.topology_basis: published topology places A. calliptera and mbuna as sisters relative to basal pelagic taxa

input_audit.comparison_locus_contract: same ordered four-group callable-site intersection and cap as the matched Lake Malawi positive/negative panel

filter_contract.variant: single-base REF and single-base ALT; no multiallelic ALT

external_expectation.guardrail: matched specificity control, not proof of absolute historical isolation

external_expectation.source_result: the source study reports no substantial genome-wide exchange between deep-benthic taxa and mbuna
